name: Basil Garden Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
2. Chop the green onions and tomato.
3. Slice the mushrooms.
4. Thinly slice the basil leaves.
5. In a large bowl, combine the torn lettuce, chopped green onions, diced tomato, sliced mushrooms, and sliced basil.
6. In a separate jar with a tight-fitting lid, whisk together the olive or vegetable oil, red wine vinegar, pepper, salt (if using), and sugar (if using).
7. Pour the dressing over the salad ingredients in the bowl.
8. Toss everything until well combined.
9. Serve immediately.
